records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Commercial District
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Commercial District
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Commercial District

records.m_Talk_ENG: EYYY! Your Gauntlet fairy, Batty Mitchie is here bringing you ultra-high tension every time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: EYYY! Your Gauntlet fairy, Batty Mitchie is here bringing you ultra-high tension every time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: EYYY! Your Gauntlet fairy, Batty Mitchie is here bringing you ultra-high tension every time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We received a report that a massive battle just broke out near the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We received a report that a massive battle just broke out near the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We received a report that a massive battle just broke out near the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 5 C.O., no less! A gigantic whale has appeared or something? The city might be reduced to rubble!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 5 C.O., no less! A gigantic whale has appeared or something? The city might be reduced to rubble!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 5 C.O., no less! A gigantic whale has appeared or something? The city might be reduced to rubble!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Are you excited? Is your heart racing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Are you excited? Is your heart racing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Are you excited? Is your heart racing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Butj\ don't worry! Every hunt will be covered live by yours truly, Mitchie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Butj\ don't worry! Every hunt will be covered live by yours truly, Mitchie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Butj\ don't worry! Every hunt will be covered live by yours truly, Mitchie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And joining us to assist with evacuation guidance is our guest, Arius!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And joining us to assist with evacuation guidance is our guest, Arius!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And joining us to assist with evacuation guidance is our guest, Arius!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! The safe shelter is this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! The safe shelter is this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! The safe shelter is this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Promise me! Move slowly so you don't get hurt!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Promise me! Move slowly so you don't get hurt!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Promise me! Move slowly so you don't get hurt!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Citizens! Over here, this way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Citizens! Over here, this way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Citizens! Over here, this way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-excuse me, miss! A Category 5 C.O. all of a sudden... Are we really going to be okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-excuse me, miss! A Category 5 C.O. all of a sudden... Are we really going to be okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-excuse me, miss! A Category 5 C.O. all of a sudden... Are we really going to be okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We moved here because we were told Charade was a safe city...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We moved here because we were told Charade was a safe city...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We moved here because we were told Charade was a safe city...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha! Don't worry, everyone! The Zodiac Knights are the knights of the people!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha! Don't worry, everyone! The Zodiac Knights are the knights of the people!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha! Don't worry, everyone! The Zodiac Knights are the knights of the people!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this is our assigned sector! We will protect you with our lives!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this is our assigned sector! We will protect you with our lives!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this is our assigned sector! We will protect you with our lives!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Medea, we found two injured people at the location Dame Leonhardt mentioned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Medea, we found two injured people at the location Dame Leonhardt mentioned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Medea, we found two injured people at the location Dame Leonhardt mentioned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their appearances match. One has a prosthetic legs, and the other is wearing headgear...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their appearances match. One has a prosthetic legs, and the other is wearing headgear...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their appearances match. One has a prosthetic legs, and the other is wearing headgear...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something feels off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something feels off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something feels off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hansol, don't you feel like someone's playing us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hansol, don't you feel like someone's playing us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hansol, don't you feel like someone's playing us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Playing us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Playing us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Playing us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did that jerk predict all of this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did that jerk predict all of this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did that jerk predict all of this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. I knew this would happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. I knew this would happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. I knew this would happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a snake. You were talking behind my back again, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a snake. You were talking behind my back again, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a snake. You were talking behind my back again, weren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Julia...? How did you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Julia...? How did you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Julia...? How did you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using my status as an Official Counter, something like this is a piece of cake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using my status as an Official Counter, something like this is a piece of cake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using my status as an Official Counter, something like this is a piece of cake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? You do know wiretapping is a personal privacy violation, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? You do know wiretapping is a personal privacy violation, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? You do know wiretapping is a personal privacy violation, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, but when I do it, it's legal surveillance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, but when I do it, it's legal surveillance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, but when I do it, it's legal surveillance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen carefully. Our objective is to minimize damage to the city caused by that thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen carefully. Our objective is to minimize damage to the city caused by that thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen carefully. Our objective is to minimize damage to the city caused by that thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We hold the defensive line and buy time until the <color=#ffd34c>key card</color> arrives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We hold the defensive line and buy time until the <color=#ffd34c>key card</color> arrives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We hold the defensive line and buy time until the <color=#ffd34c>key card</color> arrives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Key card...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Key card...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Key card...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're talking like you already know everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're talking like you already know everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're talking like you already know everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, maybe I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, maybe I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, maybe I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I'll lure that whale over there, so get ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'll lure that whale over there, so get ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I'll lure that whale over there, so get ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm counting on you. My dear Dame Medea Davis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm counting on you. My dear Dame Medea Davis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm counting on you. My dear Dame Medea Davis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blech.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blech.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blech.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! I told you everything is being monitored, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! I told you everything is being monitored, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! I told you everything is being monitored, didn't I?
